Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi.OpenApiProvider

Packages that use OpenApiProvider
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi
Server-side OpenAPI 3.1 emission — the OpenApiProvider SPI and the BasicOpenApiProvider default implementation that walks an RestContext and produces an OpenApi document.

  • Uses of OpenApiProvider in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OpenApiProvider
    RestContext.getOpenApiProvider()
    Returns the OpenAPI 3.1 provider used by this resource.

    Description

    RestAnnotation.Builder.openApiProvider(Class<? extends OpenApiProvider> value)
    Sets the Rest.openApiProvider() property on this annotation.
    SELF
    RestBuilder.openApiProvider(Class<? extends OpenApiProvider> value)
    Specifies the openApiProvider for this resource.

    Modifier and Type

    OpenApiProvider.Builder
    OpenApiProvider.Builder.type(Class<? extends OpenApiProvider> value)
    Specifies a subclass of OpenApiProvider to create when the OpenApiProvider.Builder.build() method is called.
